◎主　　演　弗雷德里克·勒努瓦 Frédéric Lenoir


◎简　　介  

　　What is the meaning of life ? Why do we live? Why are we dying? What is love ? These questions, the philosopher and best-selling author Frédéric qigou.cc Lenoir, asked them to children aged 7 to 10, during philosophical workshops he conducted in two elementary schools during a school year.
introduction: What is the meaning of life ? Why do we live? Why are we dying? What is love ? These questions, the philosopher and best-selling author Frédéric qigou.cc Lenoir, asked them to children aged 7 to 10, during philosophical workshops he conducted in two elementary schools during a school year.
